per_outcome.operationalization: Count of viewer watches meeting platform-defined duration thresholds (full duration for 3-7s videos; ≥7s for longer videos), measured over first two weeks post-posting

Binary indicator of whether a posted video includes a title, measured as probability across videos
Binary indicator of whether a posted video includes hashtags, measured as probability across videos

Proportion of content words (nouns, verbs, adjectives) to total words in video title text
Ratio of unique words to total words in video title text
